The '''Obtrexta system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|system]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bescane/Legends|Bescane]] and was located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

{{System-stub}}
